definitions.score_vector: v(l) = [s_A(l), s_B(l), s_C(l), s_D(l)] — four option scores at layer l from cached token-bucket readouts
definitions.k_dyn: argmax_{j != c} s_j(l), tie-break A < B < C < D
definitions.k_fix: k_dyn(L-1) — dynamic competitor at the final layer
definitions.delta_soft_prob_interpretation: delta_soft(tau=1) equals the log-odds of the correct option vs the geometric mean of incorrect options under softmax over the four-choice subspace. delta_soft=0 corresponds to p(correct) = sum(p(incorrect))/3, not exactly p(correct)=0.5 in general.
definitions.switch_indicator: 1 if l >= 1 and k_dyn(l) != k_dyn(l-1), else 0
definitions.flip_count: number of sign changes in the sign sequence of delta_default across layers, dropping exact zeros
definitions.commitment_layer: smallest l such that delta_signed(l') >= M for all l' >= l; null if none exists
definitions.regime_stable_correct: flip_count <= max_flips AND commitment_layer is not null AND delta_default(L-1) > 0
definitions.regime_stable_wrong: flip_count <= max_flips AND commitment_layer is not null AND delta_default(L-1) < 0

allowed_qualified_phrases.decision boundary: must be qualified as 'zero-margin boundary (delta_soft = 0)' or 'equal-odds boundary'
allowed_qualified_phrases.decision space: must be defined explicitly as '4-dimensional option-score space'
